policy.benchmark_isolation: Do not mix SyntheticA into the trusted TaskA benchmark.
policy.split_rule: No family leakage between dev and holdout.

bird_continuity.goal: Check bird identity, branch/perch salience, and concrete motion verbs.

robot_task_continuity.goal: Check mechanical identity persistence and task-specific action grounding.

multi_animal_layout.goal: Check multi-animal count, left/right layout, and relation stability.

child_toy_body_scale.goal: Check child age bucket, toy salience, and child-scale interactions.

wardrobe_color_stability.goal: Check outfit color persistence under scene changes.

book_window_prop_alignment.goal: Check panel-specific prop alignment for book and window relations.

glove_tool_prop_alignment.goal: Check gloves and tool visibility in kitchen/task panels.

vehicle_window_bag_alignment.goal: Check bus/car window phrasing and bag visibility without scene overwrite.

office_face_monitor_alignment.goal: Check glasses/monitor/chair consistency in office panels.
